name: com.wayn.games.locomotion
description: The Locomotion package provides a modular, ECS-based system for controlling characters in Unity using the new Input System, Physics, and state-driven locomotion logic. It separates core gameplay entities (Players/AI Agent, Characters, and Models) and handles input, movement, and visual synchronization in a robust and scalable way.

samples.description: Sample scene demonstrating the locomotion system features in a single player context.
Sample scene demonstrating the locomotion system features in a local multiplayer player context.
